name: Raisin Nougat
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon Lemon Flavoring with Yellow Coloring (OR)
1/2 teaspoon Raspberry Flavoring with Pink Coloring
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, salt, white corn syrup, and water in a heavy saucepan.
2. Boil the mixture over medium-high heat until it reaches 285°F to 290°F on an instant-read thermometer. Stir constantly.
3. Remove from heat and let cool for about 5 minutes.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the marshmallow cream with cocoa butter until light and fluffy.
5. Add lemon or raspberry flavoring (and corresponding coloring) and raisins to the marshmallow mixture. Mix well.
6. Pour the cooled sugar syrup into a greased baking dish.
7. Spread the marshmallow mixture evenly over the surface of the hot syrup, creating an even layer about 1/2 inch thick.
8. Using a sharp knife or bench scraper, cut the nougat into squares.
9. Allow to cool completely before serving.
